case_title: CHAN, PHYLLIS C/O VS DEE DEE BOUTIQUE et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAN, PHYLLIS C/O IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DEE DEE BOUTIQUE YEE, DAVID DH PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO STORE CREDIT ONLY FOR ANY PRODUCTS PLAINTIFF RETURNS TO DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT DEE DEE BOUTIQUE YEE, DAVID DH
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $212.12 FILED BY CHAN, PHYLLIS C/O AS TO DEFENDANT DEE DEE BOUTIQUE YEE, DAVID DH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-24-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DEE DEE BOUTIQUE YEE, DAVID DH
